subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the servant unto him who hath believed and been guided, and who hath detached himself from all that is in the heavens and on the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من العبد الی الذی آمن و هدی و انقطع عن کل من فی السموات و الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @The Holy Spirit, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
